summary: A Go-based test runner and schema validation tool with MCP integration and Goss migration capabilities.
concerns: High volume of agent-generated extra tests (0005-0025) suggests unstable baseline coverage
Staged but uncommitted changes in a test-heavy workflow
Deep nesting of agent-generated test directories (GOrchestra/glm-agents/) pollutes repository structure
suggestions: Consolidate agent-generated extra tests into the main test suites to reduce duplication
Clean up the GOrchestra directory artifacts if they are no longer needed for orchestration tracking
Commit or stash the staged changes to maintain a clean working state
Focus on the MCP handlers and runner core as they represent the primary business logic
